_comment: Symbol dimensions recalibrated to match DXF viewport scale (0.009 mm/DU from 200A TPN Paper Space). Previous calibration was ~2.7x oversized.
_source: 26 DWG samples: 32A~500A Single Phase DB & TPN SLDs - ezdxf block/entity extraction. Viewport-corrected 2026-03-13.

_proportions.RCCB_block: same as MCCB + rcd_h=0.4298*arc_r, rcd_v=0.7777*arc_r, 18 blocks
_proportions.CT_SLD-CT_block: two semicircular arcs (bulge=-1.0), chain-link style, r=12.5 DU in block space
_proportions.2A_FUSE_block: ○×○ pattern: 2 circles (r=61.84 DU) + 2 diagonal cross lines, block 453.5×123.7 DU

MCB.description: Miniature Circuit Breaker (<100A) — 151.4deg arc. Viewport-corrected dimensions.

MCCB.description: Moulded Case Circuit Breaker (100A-630A) — 125.8deg arc. Viewport-corrected.

ACB.description: Air Circuit Breaker (>630A) with horizontal crossbar — viewport-corrected.

RCCB.description: Residual Current Circuit Breaker — 125.8deg arc + RCD bar. Viewport-corrected.

ELCB.description: Earth Leakage Circuit Breaker (same symbol as RCCB). Viewport-corrected.

KWH_METER.description: kWh Energy Meter — rectangle w/h=2.0. Viewport-corrected.

CT.description: Current Transformer (two interlocking rings/arcs). Chain-link style. Viewport-corrected.

EARTH.description: Earth / Ground Symbol (3 decreasing horizontal lines). Viewport-corrected.

BI_CONNECTOR.description: BI Connector — rectangular block (IEC busbar interconnect). Viewport-corrected.

AMMETER.description: Ammeter — circle with letter A (IEC 60617). Viewport-corrected.

VOLTMETER.description: Voltmeter — circle with letter V (IEC 60617). Viewport-corrected.

SELECTOR_SWITCH.description: Selector Switch (ASS/VSS) — two opposing arcs. Viewport-corrected.

ELR.description: Earth Leakage Relay — rectangular device block. DXF inline rect ~6×3.3mm. Sized up for readability.

POTENTIAL_FUSE.description: Potential fuse / 2A fuse link (○×○ pattern). Viewport-corrected.

INDICATOR_LIGHTS.description: 3-phase indicator lights (○-○-○). Viewport-corrected. circle_spacing_mm is center-to-center (edge gap = 3.6 - 2*0.8 = 2.0mm).
